text.title: Strategy Analysis — Business Need — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the sponsor named and is primary evidence accessible?

branch.when: sponsor_named == true AND evidence_accessible == true AND existing_spec_age < 90d

conclusion.verdict: refresh existing spec — do not duplicate

example.trace: ENG-42 → sponsor=COO → evidence in analytics → new spec drafted
